TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku kakiliman nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku u amisay a Ri-er-man a tademaw nu micidekay a kungku. nu lalaay a cudad i pabaw nu Bei-ou, izaw aca ayzaay a Rui-dian, Nul-wei, Dan-may, Ping-daw atu Fen-lan a kitaki, nika u dumaay a Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku caay kaw malecatay tu nu Fen-lan, kyu u Fen-lan a kamu caay kaw u Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a kamu nu kenic, simicidekay a kungku nu Fen-lan a tademaw, adihan kina Fen-lanay a micidekay a kungku. linga tu nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku nu Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a kenic, i Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya masaduma kuni pilihay sa, nu aydaay i hekal sikungku tu. nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungkuan tu sikakawsan, sakaudipan atu iyung a kungku, i ayaw nu kyukay atu nadikudan nu kyukay masamaudip tu, misakaudip i teban nu kasumamadan tu nasulitan, i kasumamadan migingkiway mukasiay a kawaw atu i hekalay a tademaw nu lisin. nilacul laylay u kitaki nu aadihan u binacadan nu kakawusan atu micidekay a maudipay i kitakit nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku misanga' i pabaw tu kilang nu kitakit(Yggdrasill), ya kilang mulalatay i siwaay a kitakit, idaw ku Ya-sa a binacadan nu kakawusan mu'neng i A-si-ciya-te(Asgard) atu mu'enegay a tademaw tu Zung-tu a kitakit(midgard), siwaay a kitakit idaw tu ku dumaay a tademaw, u kuliay a salaw(j√∂tunn), A-sa binacadan a kakawusan(Aesir), Huwa-na binacadan a kakawusan , cuyuh atu Zu-lu . nu kiliay a salaw a tu'as Yu-mi-el(Yimrir) lecu' tu nu kakawusan, nika u ada amin nu kakawusan, taneng katinengan nu tademaw tu nu hekalay a icelang. maltusa ku kakawusan nu binacadan, u tada kakawusan nu Aw-ding ku mukelit tu A-sa binacadan a kakawusan atu bayu'ay a kakawusan Ni-yu-te(Njord) tu misakelitay a Huwa-na binacadan a kakawusan , sabaw tusa ku kakawusan a tatudu'ay. u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nadikudan a micidekay a kungku siwaay a kitaki u tatangahan nu kakawsan nu pilipayayay a kawaw mipaculal tu nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku natinengan nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku nu sumamadan a dadiw Ni-bul-lung-ken a dadiw mabalaki a Ay-da paluhay a Ay-da nu nalimaan a iga Ni-bul-lung-ken a zhihuan (Der Ring des Nibelungen) lei-shen-sul-er xing-ji-zhi-men wei-jing-chuan-qi cu-sen-huang-hun( Ragnarok Netflix ) mutiyung atu mangga ťĽÉťáĎť≠ā -soul of gold- (ALOÁĮá (comico) sasalamaen battle spirits (Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice) Á•ěšĻčśĶ©Śäę(Smite ) Á•ěŤ©ĪšłĖÁīÄ Á•ěšĻčť†ėŚüü(Asgard) ŤęłÁ•ěťĽÉśėŹ(LOKI) šĽôŚĘÉŚā≥Ť™™(Ragnarok) (Northgard) ) MARVEL:AVENGERS ALLIANCE Fortissimo//Akkord:Bsusvier cudad duo-shen-qi-wen tong-huang-wu-jing-de-fa-fu-na aw-ding-de-zhu-fu kang-tie-de-lu-yi a-si-jia-mo-ri zui-hou-de-nu-shen lung-zu yi-chang-sheng-wu-jian-wen-lu
S.PHON: nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku u amisaj a *i-…ôr-man a tad…ômaw nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku. nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj a ¶udad i pabaw nu b…ôi-ou, izaw a ¶a ajzaaj a *ui-dian, nur~…ĺ-w…ôi, dan-maj, piŇč-daw atu f…ôn-r~…ĺan a kitaki, nika u dumaaj a b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ataj tu nu f…ôn-r~…ĺan, kju u f…ôn-r~…ĺan a kamu ¶aaj kaw u si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a kamu nu k…ôni ¶, simi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu f…ôn-r~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, adińßan kina f…ôn-r~…ĺanaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku. r~…ĺiŇča tu nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a k…ôni ¶, i si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja masaduma kuni pir~…ĺińßaj sa, nu ajdaaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sikuŇčku tu. nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčkuan tu sikakawsan, sakaudipan atu ijuŇč a kuŇčku, i ajaw nu kjukaj atu nadikudan nu kjukaj masamaudip tu, misakaudip i t…ôban nu kasumamadan tu nasur~…ĺitan, i kasumamadan migiŇčkiwaj mukasiaj a kawaw atu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺisin. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u kitaki nu aadińßan u bina ¶adan nu kakawusan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj a maudipaj i kitakit nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku misaŇča Ē~ ° i pabaw tu kir~…ĺaŇč nu kitakit(jggdrasir~…ĺr~…ĺ), ja kir~…ĺaŇč mur~…ĺar~…ĺataj i siwaaj a kitakit, idaw ku ja-sa a bina ¶adan nu kakawusan mu Ē~ °n…ôŇč i a-si- ¶ija-t…ô(asgard) atu mu Ē~ °…ôn…ôgaj a tad…ômaw tu zuŇč-tu a kitakit(midgard), siwaaj a kitakit idaw tu ku dumaaj a tad…ômaw, u kur~…ĺiaj a sar~…ĺaw(j*tunn), a-sa bina ¶adan a kakawusan(a…ôsir), ńßuwa-na bina ¶adan a kakawusan , ¶ujuńß atu zu-r~…ĺu . nu kir~…ĺiaj a sar~…ĺaw a tu Ē~ °as ju-mi-…ôr~…ĺ(jimrir) r~…ĺ…ô ¶u Ē~ ° tu nu kakawusan, nika u ada amin nu kakawusan, tan…ôŇč katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw tu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mar~…ĺtusa ku kakawusan nu bina ¶adan, u tada kakawusan nu aw-diŇč ku muk…ôr~…ĺit tu a-sa bina ¶adan a kakawusan atu baju Ē~ °aj a kakawusan ni-ju-t…ô(njord) tu misak…ôr~…ĺitaj a ńßuwa-na bina ¶adan a kakawusan , sabaw tusa ku kakawusan a tatudu Ē~ °aj. u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nadikudan a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku siwaaj a kitaki u tataŇčańßan nu kakawsan nu pir~…ĺipajajaj a kawaw mipa ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ tu nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku natin…ôŇčan nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu sumamadan a dadiw ni-bur~…ĺ-r~…ĺuŇč-k…ôn a dadiw mabar~…ĺaki a aj-da par~…ĺuńßaj a aj-da nu nar~…ĺimaan a iga ni-bur~…ĺ-r~…ĺuŇč-k…ôn a zńßińßuan (d…ôr *iŇč d…ôs nib…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôn) r~…ĺ…ôi-sńß…ôn-sur~…ĺ-…ôr *iŇč-ji-zńßi-m…ôn w…ôi-jiŇč- ¶ńßuan-*i ¶u-s…ôn-ńßuaŇč-ńßun( *agnarok n…ôtfr~…ĺi* ) mutijuŇč atu maŇčga *** -sour~…ĺ of gor~…ĺd- (ar~…ĺo* ( ¶omi ¶o) sasar~…ĺama…ôn battr~…ĺ…ô spirits (ńß…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺbr~…ĺad…ô: s…ônua Ē~ °s sa ¶rifi ¶…ô) ****(smit…ô ) **** ****(asgard) ****(r~…ĺoki) ****(*agnarok) (nortńßgard) ) ma**…ôr~…ĺ:a*…ông…ô*s ar~…ĺr~…ĺian ¶…ô fortissimo//akkord:bsus*i…ôr ¶udad duo-sńß…ôn-*i-w…ôn toŇč-ńßuaŇč-wu-jiŇč-d…ô-fa-fu-na aw-diŇč-d…ô-zńßu-fu kaŇč-ti…ô-d…ô-r~…ĺu-ji a-si-jia-mo-ri zui-ńßou-d…ô-nu-sńß…ôn r~…ĺuŇč-zu ji- ¶ńßaŇč-sńß…ôŇč-wu-jian-w…ôn-r~…ĺu
S.FORM: nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku kakiliman nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku u amisay a Ri-er-man a tademaw nu micidekay a kungku. nu lalaay a cudad i pabaw nu Bei-ou, izaw aca ayzaay a Rui-dian, Nul-wei, Dan-may, Ping-daw atu Fen-lan a kitaki, nika u dumaay a Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku caay kaw malecatay tu nu Fen-lan, kyu u Fen-lan a kamu caay kaw u Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a kamu nu kenic, simicidekay a kungku nu Fen-lan a tademaw, adihan kina Fen-lanay a micidekay a kungku. linga tu nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku nu Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya a kenic, i Si-kan-ti-na-wei-ya masaduma kuni pilihay sa, nu aydaay i hekal sikungku tu. nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungkuan tu sikakawsan, sakaudipan atu iyung a kungku, i ayaw nu kyukay atu nadikudan nu kyukay masamaudip tu, misakaudip i teban nu kasumamadan tu nasulitan, i kasumamadan migingkiway mukasiay a kawaw atu i hekalay a tademaw nu lisin. nilacul laylay u kitaki nu aadihan u binacadan nu kakawusan atu micidekay a maudipay i kitakit nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku misanga' i pabaw tu kilang nu kitakit(Yggdrasill), ya kilang mulalatay i siwaay a kitakit, idaw ku Ya-sa a binacadan nu kakawusan mu'neng i A-si-ciya-te(Asgard) atu mu'enegay a tademaw tu Zung-tu a kitakit(midgard), siwaay a kitakit idaw tu ku dumaay a tademaw, u kuliay a salaw(j√∂tunn), A-sa binacadan a kakawusan(Aesir), Huwa-na binacadan a kakawusan , cuyuh atu Zu-lu . nu kiliay a salaw a tu'as Yu-mi-el(Yimrir) lecu' tu nu kakawusan, nika u ada amin nu kakawusan, taneng katinengan nu tademaw tu nu hekalay a icelang. maltusa ku kakawusan nu binacadan, u tada kakawusan nu Aw-ding ku mukelit tu A-sa binacadan a kakawusan atu bayu'ay a kakawusan Ni-yu-te(Njord) tu misakelitay a Huwa-na binacadan a kakawusan , sabaw tusa ku kakawusan a tatudu'ay. u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nadikudan a micidekay a kungku siwaay a kitaki u tatangahan nu kakawsan nu pilipayayay a kawaw mipaculal tu nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku natinengan nu Bei-ou a micidekay a kungku nu sumamadan a dadiw Ni-bul-lung-ken a dadiw mabalaki a Ay-da paluhay a Ay-da nu nalimaan a iga Ni-bul-lung-ken a zhihuan (Der Ring des Nibelungen) lei-shen-sul-er xing-ji-zhi-men wei-jing-chuan-qi cu-sen-huang-hun( Ragnarok Netflix ) mutiyung atu mangga ťĽÉťáĎť≠ā -soul of gold- (ALOÁĮá (comico) sasalamaen battle spirits (Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice) Á•ěšĻčśĶ©Śäę(Smite ) Á•ěŤ©ĪšłĖÁīÄ Á•ěšĻčť†ėŚüü(Asgard) ŤęłÁ•ěťĽÉśėŹ(LOKI) šĽôŚĘÉŚā≥Ť™™(Ragnarok) (Northgard) ) MARVEL:AVENGERS ALLIANCE Fortissimo//Akkord:Bsusvier cudad duo-shen-qi-wen tong-huang-wu-jing-de-fa-fu-na aw-ding-de-zhu-fu kang-tie-de-lu-yi a-si-jia-mo-ri zui-hou-de-nu-shen lung-zu yi-chang-sheng-wu-jian-wen-lu

ajzaaj a *ui-dian, nur~…ĺ-w…ôi, dan-maj, piŇč-daw atu f…ôn-r~…ĺan a kitaki, nika u dumaaj a b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku ¶aaj kaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ataj tu nu f…ôn-r~…ĺan, kju u f…ôn-r~…ĺan a kamu ¶aaj kaw u si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a kamu nu k…ôni ¶, simi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu f…ôn-r~…ĺan a tad…ômaw, adińßan kina f…ôn-r~…ĺanaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku. r~…ĺiŇča tu nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja a k…ôni ¶, i si-kan-ti-na-w…ôi-ja masaduma kuni pir~…ĺińßaj sa, nu ajdaaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sikuŇčku tu. nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčkuan tu sikakawsan, sakaudipan atu ijuŇč a kuŇčku, i ajaw nu kjukaj atu nadikudan nu kjukaj masamaudip tu, misakaudip i t…ôban nu kasumamadan tu nasur~…ĺitan, i kasumamadan migiŇčkiwaj mukasiaj a kawaw atu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw nu r~…ĺisin. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj u kitaki nu aadińßan u bina ¶adan nu kakawusan atu mi ¶id…ôkaj a maudipaj i kitakit nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku misaŇča Ē~ ° i pabaw tu kir~…ĺaŇč nu kitakit(jggdrasir~…ĺr~…ĺ), ja kir~…ĺaŇč mur~…ĺar~…ĺataj i siwaaj a kitakit, idaw ku ja-sa a bina ¶adan nu kakawusan mu Ē~ °n…ôŇč i a-si- ¶ija-t…ô(asgard) atu mu Ē~ °…ôn…ôgaj a tad…ômaw tu zuŇč-tu a kitakit(midgard), siwaaj a kitakit idaw tu ku dumaaj a tad…ômaw, u kur~…ĺiaj a sar~…ĺaw(j*tunn), a-sa bina ¶adan a kakawusan(a…ôsir), ńßuwa-na bina ¶adan a kakawusan , ¶ujuńß atu zu-r~…ĺu . nu kir~…ĺiaj a sar~…ĺaw a tu Ē~ °as ju-mi-…ôr~…ĺ(jimrir) r~…ĺ…ô ¶u Ē~ ° tu nu kakawusan, nika u ada amin nu kakawusan, tan…ôŇč katin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw tu nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. mar~…ĺtusa ku kakawusan nu bina ¶adan, u tada kakawusan nu aw-diŇč ku muk…ôr~…ĺit tu a-sa bina ¶adan a kakawusan atu baju Ē~ °aj a kakawusan ni-ju-t…ô(njord) tu misak…ôr~…ĺitaj a ńßuwa-na bina ¶adan a kakawusan , sabaw tusa ku kakawusan a tatudu Ē~ °aj. u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nadikudan a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku siwaaj a kitaki u tataŇčańßan nu kakawsan nu pir~…ĺipajajaj a kawaw mipa ¶ur~…ĺar~…ĺ tu nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku natin…ôŇčan nu b…ôi-ou a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu sumamadan a dadiw ni-bur~…ĺ-r~…ĺuŇč-k…ôn a dadiw mabar~…ĺaki a aj-da par~…ĺuńßaj a aj-da nu nar~…ĺimaan a iga ni-bur~…ĺ-r~…ĺuŇč-k…ôn a zńßińßuan (d…ôr *iŇč d…ôs nib…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôn) r~…ĺ…ôi-sńß…ôn-sur~…ĺ-…ôr *iŇč-ji-zńßi-m…ôn w…ôi-jiŇč- ¶ńßuan-*i ¶u-s…ôn-ńßuaŇč-ńßun( *agnarok n…ôtfr~…ĺi* ) mutijuŇč atu maŇčga ***
